name: io.github.sequenzy/mcp
description: Sequenzy MCP server for AI-powered email marketing automation.

environmentVariables.name: SEQUENZY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Sequenzy API key (get one from the Sequenzy dashboard under Settings > API Keys)

environmentVariables.name: SEQUENZY_APP_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional Sequenzy app base URL for dashboard links. Defaults to https://sequenzy.com.
